description: Example task instances demonstrating the full range of task types in the Orchestrator_main system.

tasks.title: Triage morning email batch
tasks.description: Process the email batch from the morning of 2026-04-21. Classify each email by urgency and required action. Produce draft responses for items requiring a reply. Flag any scheduling items for A-10.
tasks.notes: Priority inbox: look for anything from Wave Bite or Himmelreich contacts.

tasks.title: Compile daily operations briefing
tasks.description: Compile the daily briefing for 2026-04-21. Include: top priorities, pending approvals, scheduled items, overdue tasks, and any flagged escalations. Format for human review.
tasks.notes: Include any carryover items from the past 7 days.

tasks.title: Extract and structure Wave Bite website content
tasks.description: Perform a full extraction of the Wave Bite website. Extract all pages, menu items, images, CTAs, and key copy. Store raw content in /data/raw/wave-bite/ for downstream processing.
tasks.notes: Awaiting URL list approval from human operator before extraction begins.

tasks.title: Draft LinkedIn post for Wave Bite launch
tasks.description: Create a LinkedIn post announcing the Wave Bite app launch. Tone should be professional and energetic. Include a clear CTA. Draft only — human approval required before use.
tasks.notes: Dependency on website extraction — cannot draft without approved content source.

tasks.title: Generate weekly business operations report
tasks.description: Compile a summary operations report for the week of 2026-04-14 to 2026-04-20. Include: tasks completed, approvals outstanding, projects in progress, blockers, and next week priorities.
tasks.notes: Elevated approval required before sharing externally.

tasks.title: Analyse and classify desktop file backlog
tasks.description: Review the file listing provided and classify each item by type, relevance, and recommended action (keep, archive, delete candidate, route to project). Produce analysis plan only — no file operations.
tasks.notes: Analysis only. No file is moved or deleted without explicit per-item human approval.

tasks.title: Personal task — plan Himmelreich content calendar
tasks.description: Create a structured content calendar for Himmelreich for May 2026. Include: content themes, posting schedule, platform assignments, and required assets. Output as a draft for human review.
tasks.notes: Part of personal task execution workflow W-13.
